name: supermaestro
description: 面向 Codex 的需求接收、任务编排与验证工作流插件。

scripts.lint:syntax: node --check plugins/supermaestro/scripts/supermaestro.js && node --check plugins/supermaestro/scripts/validation-evidence.js && node --check plugins/supermaestro/scripts/source-fingerprint.js && node --check plugins/supermaestro/skills/mission-control/scripts/harness.js && node --check plugins/supermaestro/skills/mission-control/scripts/check-reviewability.js && node --check plugins/supermaestro/skills/mission-control/scripts/inspect-ui.js && node --check plugins/supermaestro/skills/mission-control/scripts/scaffold-execution-mode.js && node --check plugins/supermaestro/skills/lanhu-export/scripts/lanhu-export.mjs
scripts.validate:versions: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const pkg=require('./package.json');const manifest=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('plugins/supermaestro/.codex-plugin/plugin.json','utf8'));if(pkg.version!==manifest.version){throw new Error('package.json 与 plugin.json 版本不一致: '+pkg.version+' != '+manifest.version)}console.log('版本一致: '+pkg.version)"
scripts.test: npm run lint:syntax && npm run validate:versions && node tests/repository-integrity.test.js && node tests/supermaestro-smoke.test.js && node tests/supermaestro-v2-smoke.test.js && node tests/supermaestro-strict-contracts.test.js && node tests/supermaestro-validation-evidence.test.js && node tests/validation-evidence-path-security.test.js && node tests/supermaestro-path-security.test.js && node tests/supermaestro-workflow-migration.test.js && node tests/supermaestro-worktree-registry.test.js && node plugins/supermaestro/skills/mission-control/scripts/harness.test.js && node plugins/supermaestro/skills/mission-control/scripts/check-reviewability.test.js && node plugins/supermaestro/skills/lanhu-export/scripts/lanhu-export.security.test.mjs && node plugins/supermaestro/skills/mission-control/scripts/inspect-ui.security.test.js
